title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Cybersecurity Analysts protect computer systems and networks from cyber threats. They plan and implement security measures to safeguard sensitive data and critical infrastructure.
content: Cybersecurity Analysts are responsible for monitoring networks for security breaches, investigating security incidents, and developing security policies and procedures. They use various tools and techniques to identify vulnerabilities, assess risks, and respond to cyberattacks. This career requires strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a passion for technology.

financialFeasibility.note: While a strong educational background is essential, scholarships and educational loans are available, making this career accessible to students from middle-class backgrounds. Certification courses can be expensive but increase employability.

sectorScore.remarks: High demand in both government and private sectors in India. Private sector offers higher salaries and faster career growth, while government jobs offer more stability.
